# The Napkin Company

> Custom printed paper napkins for restaurants, weddings, corporate events, hotels, and yachts. From 50 units, delivered in 12 days or before.

The Napkin Company is a custom-printed paper napkin supplier serving hospitality, events, and corporate brands across the United States. We work for restaurants, hotels, wedding planners, event agencies, yacht crews, and corporate marketing teams who need branded napkins fast and at any quantity from 50 to 1,000,000 units.

## What we make

We make cocktail, beverage, dinner, and guest-towel napkins in airlaid, two-ply, and three-ply paper. Print options include full-color digital, hot-stamp foil (37 Pantone-matched colors), and standard one-color flexographic printing. Custom shapes, custom sizes, custom embossing, and custom edge dies are supported.

## How we operate (the 3 pillars)

- **Fast service** — 12 days standard turnaround, 5-day rush available. Quotes returned the same business day.
- **High technology** — In-house mockup generator with live color and material preview. Pantone-matched foils. Direct file handoff (PDF, AI, EPS, PNG).
- **Human-to-human deals** — Every order goes through a real person. No marketplace middleman. Direct WhatsApp and email contact for the entire production run.

## Contact

- Email: hello@thenapkincompany.com
- WhatsApp: +1 786 964 9146
- Instagram: @thenapkincompanyus

## Catalog

- [Custom Cocktail Napkins](https://thenapkincompany.com/custom-cocktail-napkins): 5×5 inch cocktail napkins for bars, parties, and hospitality.
- [Custom Wedding & Event Napkins](https://thenapkincompany.com/custom-wedding-event-napkins): Wedding-grade cocktail and dinner napkins with foil, custom shapes, and luxury finishes.
- [Custom Napkins with Logo](https://thenapkincompany.com/custom-napkins-with-logo): Logo-printed napkins for agencies, corporate brands, and merchandising.
- [Custom Printed Napkins](https://thenapkincompany.com/custom-printed-napkins): Full-color digital print on cocktail, beverage, and dinner napkins.
- [Personalized Napkins](https://thenapkincompany.com/personalized-napkins): Small-batch personalized napkins for birthdays, anniversaries, and private events.
- [Custom Restaurant & Bar Napkins](https://thenapkincompany.com/custom-restaurant-bar-napkins): Branded napkins for restaurant groups, bars, lounges, and cafés.
- [Custom Restaurant Napkins](https://thenapkincompany.com/custom-restaurant-napkins): Disposable dinner and beverage napkins for restaurant service.
- [Custom Hotel Napkins](https://thenapkincompany.com/custom-hotel-napkins): Branded hospitality napkins for hotel bars, room service, and events.
- [Custom Yacht Napkins](https://thenapkincompany.com/custom-yacht-napkins): Branded napkins for yacht crews, charter companies, and maritime hospitality.
- [Custom Napkins for Event Planners](https://thenapkincompany.com/custom-napkins-for-event-planners): Wholesale custom napkins for event planners and production companies.
- [Custom Napkins for Agencies](https://thenapkincompany.com/custom-napkins-for-agencies): White-label custom napkin manufacturing for creative and marketing agencies.
- [Custom Event Napkins](https://thenapkincompany.com/custom-event-napkins): Branded napkins for galas, conferences, festivals, and corporate events.
- [Corporate Event Napkins](https://thenapkincompany.com/corporate-event-napkins): Branded napkins for corporate launches, employee events, and B2B activations.
- [Custom Beverage Napkins](https://thenapkincompany.com/custom-beverage-napkins): Branded napkins for bar programs, lounges, pool bars, country clubs, and beverage service.
- [Airlaid Napkins](https://thenapkincompany.com/airlaid-napkins): Premium airlaid napkins with linen-like feel. Cocktail, dinner, kangaroo fold, and 1/8 fold guest towel.
- [Foil Stamp Napkins](https://thenapkincompany.com/foil-stamp-napkins): Hot stamp foil printing in 37 Pantone-matched colors. Metallic, holographic, pigment, and matte families.

## Specs

- Minimum order: 50 units.
- Maximum order: 1,000,000+ units per run.
- Standard turnaround: 12 business days from artwork approval.
- Rush turnaround: 5 business days (surcharge applies).
- Materials: airlaid, two-ply, three-ply paper.
- Print methods: full-color digital, hot-stamp foil, one-color flexographic.
- Foil colors: 37 Pantone-matched options.
- Payment: Visa, Mastercard, American Express, PayPal, Stripe, Bitcoin.
- Service area: United States (all 50 states).
